entry.title: Re: add toolbar action on a table to update all rows
entry.content: Where is this code snippet coming from? And where / how do you trigger a user input in order to get the to be updated title ?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere change a remote table to a view
entry.content:
Hi,

In our Datasphere setup, we replicate tables from ECC and use them across multiple SQL models and views. Due to limitations in our SAC version (no real-time replication support) and the absence of SLT, we had to optimize replication by splitting large remote tables into historical and current datasets.

Here’s a simplified version of what we did using BSEG as an example:

  • We created:

    • h_BSEG: remote table with data <= 2024

    • c_BSEG: remote table with data >= 2025

  • Our goal: only replicate changes in c_BSEG, saving time and load.

Then we created a view:

SELECT * FROM h_BSEG
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM c_BSEG

This gives us a unified view of the full dataset, which we intended to replace the original BSEG remote table with — so that existing queries and views across other spaces would continue working.

The Challenge:

The original BSEG remote table has many dependencies (queries, models, shares), so deleting or renaming it wasn’t straightforward.

Solutions Explored:

  1. Rename/Delete + Replace:

    • Delete BSEG, reimport it as z_BSEG_original.

    • Then create a new view named BSEG (with union logic).

    • Re-share it to consuming spaces.

    • Requires managing dependencies during the switch.

  2. Alias View (BSEG_union)

    • Create a union view under a new name (BSEG_union).

    • Update queries manually to use it.

    • Less risk, more manual work downstream.

  3. Replace Shared Object

    • If BSEG is only used as a shared artifact:

      • Unshare → delete remote table → create view → share under same name.

      • Consumers still see BSEG — now backed by the union view.

Key Lessons:

  • A stable semantic layer (views with fixed names) is invaluable — you can evolve logic behind the scenes without disrupting consumers.

  • Planning for decoupled access and layering helps maintain agility and avoid heavy refactoring.

If anyone’s faced something similar or has additional strategies for managing dependencies when replacing remote tables with views — would love to hear them!

entry.title: Changes in work order propagated to released PO
entry.content:
Hi Team,

If we change certain details in the work order like purchase organization will the same be propagated in the purchase order. If so how?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: Re: mass change of fixed asset master data in S/4HANA Clo...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Here you find the answer to your question:

Manage Fixed Assets:

To create and change asset master data en masse, corresponding APIs are available. For more information, see APIs for Asset Accounting.

Kind regards,
Henrike

entry.title: Re: Asset Retirement F-92 AA doc Type not provided
entry.content:
Hello.

I have exactly the same problem. How do you overcome this issue? I have tested this process on another client (another sap machine), and works fine.

However I have a different client, when F-92 only post to document type DR-

Any help?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Asset Retirement F-92 AA doc Type not provided
entry.content:
Hello. I have the exact same issue. I have configured 3 valuation areas with 2 accounting principles.

In OADB I have the following:

Valuation area 1 -> Accounting Principle A-> post real time

Valuation area 2 -> Accounting Principle B -> post real time

Valuation area 3 -> Accounting Principle A -> Do not post

entry.title: Re: Add Value Help to SAP Fiori Elements App
entry.content: Thanks Attila, I can't make it work though. While the dropdown list appears, it is never getting populated. The redefined method GET_ENTITYSET is never called with the new value help as entity name.

entry.title: Re: Buyer Responsible Question on SRM Topic
entry.content:
Hello Ori,

Hope all is well

When accessing the link provided in the answer above, the data might not be displayed correctly because you do not yet have access to the SAP for Me Portal as an S-User.

Therefore, it will be required to request a S-User access for you.

To create a new S-user

Please send a request via one of below option channel to our CIC team and request to create a new S-user for your company.

Please mention in the content of the  e-mail: customer ID , full name , e-mail and phone of the person which must to be created as new S-user.

E-mail : https://go.support.sap.com/contactus/#/email
Chat : https://go.support.sap.com/contactus/#/chat
Phone: https://support.sap.com/en/contact-us/phone.html

Regards,
Gabriel

entry.title: CPI Custom Adapter development
entry.content:
Hello

I'm working on a custom adapter for CPI

I'm already using Archetype and Camel version 3

I was able to make ir work but there is a something I was not able to found it in the documentation.

I would like to have in the fields the possibility to hide and show some field (like in the HTTP Adapter when you select the Basic Authetication and the Credential name became visible)

I did not found anything related in the metadata documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/component-metadata

Someone can help me on that?

Thanks a lot

Cristiano

entry.title: Re: Confirm Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hello Jan,

the processes are actually correct.

If you have entered a confirmation via the "Manager Supplier Confirmation" app, it is stored in the order under the Confirmation tab. You can still change the order quantity, but there will be a warning "already confirmed for item XXX"

If you want to change something beforehand, you must first change or delete the confirmation in the "Manage Supplier Confirmations" app.  You can then adjust the order.

The other option would be to enter the confirmation directly in the "Change Purchase Order" app under Confirmations.

Best regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes

entry.title: Re: Preparing for SAP Identity Management’s End-of-Maintenance in 2027
entry.content:
I have a customer who is in IDM 7.2 and they are looking to migrate to Sailpoint instead of Entra ID. Would they have to upgrade IDM 7.2 to 8.0 in order to migrate across? Is there a path to migrate from SAP IDM 7.2 to Sailpoint ISC?

I know from past work when I was at Defensive Architecture team at Waldorf the pain point of dealing with IDM 7.2. What options do I have with migrating from 7.2?

Thanks Tony

entry.title: Is BOM versioning in S/4HANA Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
We have a client requirement stating, when we try to amend the existing bill of material the system should automatically create a version of BOM to that alternate.

 

I have checked for any workaround but able to find that column in "Maintain Bill of material" but i required that to be enabled while doing amendment.

 

Please suggest us how we can achieve this automation.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is BOM versioning in S/4HANA Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
The BOM versioning feature ( as outlined in the Community Blog Version Bill of Material creation ´(SAP PEO) ) is not available in S/4HANA Public Cloud 

 

Previously it was available with the Scope Item 1NR: Engineering Bill of Material - Versions Management which as since been deprecated ( as of release 1908 ) and no longer available

entry.title: Efficient Data Maintenance in SAP Analytics Cloud System Overview - Housekeeping
entry.content:
We're excited to share an important enhancement to our service - we've upgraded our System Overview Housekeeping feature!

It will be available with Wave 2025.06 on Fast Track Tenants and with 2025.Q2 QRC Release on QRC Tenants.

In the past, we have provided many useful pieces of information with the System Overview. Now, we’ve taken the next step and are closing another gap. We are making the information actionable, meaning we allow batch deletion of unused objects. This will be possible through our previously introduced  System Overview Housekeeping feature.

To play the small demo video please select the picture.

This is an evolution towards better data management and an improved user experience. The feature now includes a selective deletion function for objects.

What does this mean for you?

This advancement allows you to delete specific objects of your choice, eliminating the effort of manual cleaning. But it doesn’t stop there. In addition to the primary object, all dependent objects are also automatically deleted. This means you no longer need to worry about unnecessary and unused objects adding up in your system and slowing down its performance. This upgrade marks another step in our journey towards offering smarter, simplified solutions that resonate with your business needs. 

Easier Administration:

The ability to delete objects and their dependencies with just a few clicks significantly enhances user-friendliness. This makes the administration of the system considerably easier for administrators.

Improved Transparency:

The display of objects that have not been used in a specific period gives users a clear overview of which data can be safely deleted. No more worrying about accidentally deleting something important. This level of transparency empowers users to confidently manage their data, with the assurance that they're not getting rid of crucial information in the process.

Less Maintenance Effort:

The automatic detection and deletion of dependencies and objects mean less manual work. Teams no longer need to regularly clean up and search for dependencies, which simplifies maintenance and reduces administrative effort. The feature automates the process, thus freeing up your team to focus on tasks that truly require their expertise.

The Past vs The Present:

In the past, users would have to manually search for all dependent objects in the system and delete them before they could delete the main object. This process was not only time-consuming but also prone to errors, as users might not have discovered all dependencies.

Important Technical Background:

With postMessage API (Analytics Designer API Reference Guide - postMessage ) that, for your security, can only be invoked from the System Overview content, we allow to delete SAC Objects.

Important Notes:

  • Deletion of Connections and Folders is not yet allowed but is planned to be available with 2025.Q4.
  • Deletion is limited, due to performance reasons, to 5k Rows in the Selection Table.

The following objects can be deleted:

  • Model
  • Dataset
  • Folder
  • Story
  • Application
  • Composite
  • Digital Boardroom
  • Insight
  • Data Action
  • Multi Action
  • Theme
  • Connection
  • Content Link

There is a difference between hard and stage delete. Stage delete first makes a detour through the recycle bin, while hard delete removes objects permanently.

Hard delete is applicable for the following objects:

  • Model
  • Custom Widget
  • Connection
  • Folder
  • Multiaction
  • Data Action
  • Rate

The rest undergoes stage deletion.

We first search for all dependencies and delete those before removing the parent objects. Depending on the number of selected objects and the number of dependent objects, the deletion process can take a few minutes. Please be patient.

And with this, we believe that the new and improved System Overview Housekeeping feature will be a game-changer for your administrative workload! Stay tuned for more updates and improvements.

And as always, we're here to assist you. If you've any queries or need any help with the new feature, feel free to reach out to us.

Your success is our motivation!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, three-system landscape, parallel line – High Level Introductio

entry.title: Re: #COE#SW01 Copy data from Business Partner custom fiel...
entry.content:
Hi,

The custom logic (BAdI) available for business partner and customer objects are meant for validation and it doesnt populate the data or change it.

You can use the developer extensibility option or RPA option that Jai mentioned.

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Setup - Publish Stocks from SF-COMP to SF-EC
entry.content:
Hi @SG_SF 

Publishing back from Stock tab works exactly like publishing back a lumpSum from the Compensation tab to a non-recurring pay component of EC.

 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2419082

All the best,

Xavier

entry.content:

@jorg_vdst , how can we map analytical dataset (fact) with text table having no common columns for mapping.

Explorer

We have text table for attribute of a dimension and want to show text for attribute. We have created dimension and attach text table for dimension and as well as attribute text table. In the analytical model we can see description of dimension, but attribute description is coming as id and not text. What are we missing here.
Please let me know if more information is required. Any clue would be helpful.

Best Regards,
Arvind

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Complex integration with with SAP BRM - SFTP
entry.content:
Thanks @MustafaBensan for asking clarification.

There is no SAP path to migrate NetWeaver BRM into SAP BTP BPA.
Migrate your On-Premise SAP BPM applications to SA... - SAP Community

Follow-up question: Is there a SAP way to export NetWeaver Developer Studio BRM SAPScript rules into plain text? Or export SAPScripts from SAP NetWeaver XML files?

entry.title: Re: "Define Freight order type" config node missing in S/...
entry.content:
Hi @S_Arora,

Currently there is no configuration activity available to define Freight Order types. If you would like to request a feature, please check the SAP KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Introduction
entry.content:
Hello,

My name is Nandipha. I live in the US and primarily work with SuccessFactors Employee Central. Looking forward to participating in this community!

entry.title: Re: Intermittent Http_Communication_Failure Error in ABAP...
entry.content:
Hi Ravi,

NIECONN_REFUSED means that no one on host "hostadress" is listening on port 443. (The TCP/IP layer of the operating system is then "refusing" to accept a connection on that port.) So there is nothing wrong with your ABAP code, the problem rather is on the other end (the CPI system).

If this is happening "intermittently", then this means that "once in a while" the CPI system is down. (Or has stopped listening on port 443.)
--> Needs to be checked on CPI side, what is going on there.

entry.title: Re: SFCMP-23218 - Employee Central Data on Compensation S...
entry.content:

1. Yes

2. Template effective date

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Be Visual! Use Official Icons and Samples for SAP Business Technology Platform Solution Diagrams
entry.content:
thanks for the information. It seems some links are expired/invalid. could you update it?  

  1. Download the MS PowerPoint slide deck SAP-BTP_official-solution-diagrams-and-icons_v01.pptx
  2. Download the SAP Business Technology Platform icons collection ZIP file (icons in PNG or SVG format) for use inside solution diagrams
  3. Follow the Terms Of Use for the SAP Business Technology Platform Solution Diagrams, Design Elements & Icons

entry.title: Re: Datasphere change a remote table to a view
entry.content: Thansk for the feedback. Unfortunately, we started setting this up in early 2021 when we were new to DWC and some of the features weren't fully mature and knowledge a little lacking. We are actually one of only 10 customers still on the orignal SKU and SAP met with us to get us on the most recent SKU of datasphere. So, I totally agree with a semantic layer of views. Fortunately, all remote replicated tables are in their own space and shared out to other spaces where they are used in SQL or graphical views. Are you saying if I unshared the table to the spaces, it won;t be views by the system as haviong dependencies anymore and I can deleted the remote table and replace it with a view like discussed? The share the view out to the spaces? This won't break any queries except if they are called during the transition?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere change a remote table to a view
entry.content: BTW, if I can unshare the remote table. delete it and recreate a view in the space and share the view out, that will save a ton of time versus fixing all the queries.

entry.title: Re: Why cant find the data sources of “I_BusinessUserVH” when creat new CDS。
entry.content: nice idea but it was not archived

entry.title: Re: Datasphere change a remote table to a view
entry.content: I created a test scenario where I shared a table to another space, adding it to a SQL view and then tried to unshare. The system sores not allow me to unshare. Says "We could not unshare your Remote Table (Relational Dataset) because it is used by the following model in a different space." Maybe this could be done in the past but seems not now.

entry.title: SAP ALM Roadshow LAC 2025 - Lima, Peru Edition
entry.content:
Get ready, Lima!

We're arriving with our SAP ALM Roadshow on May 27th, 2025. You have the opportunity to learn from our ALM specialists.

Would you like to start your ALM journey? This is the perfect moment to do so. The event is completely free and is designed to offer you the best practices and knowledge in Application Lifecycle Management (ALM).

Don't miss this excellent opportunity to interact with experts and learn about the latest trends and tools in ALM.

Registrations are now open. Sign up now and secure your spot!

For more information and to register, visit the following link: https://go4.events.sap.com/pe-alm-roadshow-lac-2025-peru/es_co/home.htmlhttps://lnkd.in/dV43VaqU

See you at the SAP ALM Roadshow in Lima!

entry.title: [Webinar] - SAP Cloud ALM - Efficiently Managing RISE with SAP Projects - Português
entry.content:
[Webinar] - SAP Cloud ALM - Efficiently Managing RISE with SAP Projects - Português

Participe deste webinar para aprender como gerenciar projetos RISE with SAP de maneira eficiente, garantindo a entrega dentro do prazo e do orçamento estipulado. Serão abordadas melhores práticas e estratégias para otimizar recursos, mitigar riscos e maximizar o valor de suas iniciativas de transformação digital, utilizando a plataforma RISE with SAP.

Inscreva-se aqui https://events.teams.microsoft.com/event/a0596b21-8978-4309-8cb2-4800ffc62fb6@42f7676c-f455-423c-82f6-dc2d99791af7

Pré-requisitos    

Solicitamos que você complete as seguintes etapas antes de participar do evento:

  1. Realize o processo de ativação do seu tenant. Acesse o link para ativar seu SAP Cloud ALM (caso ainda não tenha sido provisionado): https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/provisioning.
  2. Como Solicitar SAP Cloud ALM no SAP for Me - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=axFjM01ZnU0
  3. Lembre-se do ID de usuário e da senha que foram usados para reivindicar o tenant do SAP Cloud ALM e também para o cockpit do BTP.
  4. Link para acessar o cockpit do BTP - https://account.hana.ondemand.com/#/home/welcome
  5. Verifique o e-mail de notification@sap.com para o link de acesso ao seu SAP Cloud ALM e os próximos passos.
  6. Link para acessar Configuração e Administração para SAP Cloud ALM - Configuração da Fundação https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/enabling-api.

entry.title: [Webinar] SAP Cloud ALM - Efficiently Managing RISE with SAP Projects - Español
entry.content:
[Webinar] SAP Cloud ALM - Efficiently Managing RISE with SAP Projects - Español

Participe en este seminario web para aprender a gestionar proyectos RISE with SAP de manera eficiente, asegurando la entrega dentro del plazo y presupuesto establecidos. Se abordarán las mejores prácticas y estrategias para optimizar recursos, mitigar riesgos y maximizar el valor de sus iniciativas de transformación digital utilizando la plataforma RISE with SAP.

Registrese aquí https://events.teams.microsoft.com/event/49d25eea-6bb9-4e50-90dc-918dcecd9b5f@42f7676c-f455-423c-82f6-dc2d99791af7

Requisitos previos     

Le solicitamos que complete los siguientes pasos antes de asistir al evento:

  1. Realice el proceso de activación de su tenant. Acceda al enlace para activar su SAP Cloud ALM (en caso de que aún no haya sido provisionado): https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/provisioning.
  2. Cómo Solicitar SAP Cloud ALM en SAP for Me - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=axFjM01ZnU0
  3. Recuerde el ID de usuario y la contraseña que se usaron para activar el inquilino de SAP Cloud ALM y también para el cockpit de BTP.
  4. Enlace para acceder al cockpit de BTP - https://account.hana.ondemand.com/#/home/welcome
  5. Verifique el correo electrónico de notification@sap.com para el enlace de acceso a su SAP Cloud ALM y los próximos pasos.
  6. Enlace para acceder a la Configuración y Administración de SAP Cloud ALM - Configuración de la Fundación https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/enabling-api.

entry.title: [Webinar] - SAP Cloud ALM - Streamlining Business Process While Preserving Clean Core - Português
entry.content:
[Webinar] - SAP Cloud ALM - Streamlining Business Process While Preserving Clean Core - Português

Conheça as técnicas para otimizar processos de negócios sem comprometer a integridade do seu núcleo SAP. Este webinar explorará métodos para identificar e implementar melhorias operacionais que mantêm um "Clean Core", garantindo que sua empresa se beneficie de avanços sem acumular customizações que dificultam futuros upgrades e inovações.

Registre-se aqui https://events.teams.microsoft.com/event/dfc3404d-9747-44d8-82c2-e909ced33f35@42f7676c-f455-423c-82f6-dc2d99791af7

Pré-requisitos    

Solicitamos que você complete as seguintes etapas antes de participar do evento:

  1. Realize o processo de ativação do seu tenant. Acesse o link para ativar seu SAP Cloud ALM (caso ainda não tenha sido provisionado): https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/provisioning.
  2. Como Solicitar SAP Cloud ALM no SAP for Me - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=axFjM01ZnU0
  3. Lembre-se do ID de usuário e da senha que foram usados para reivindicar o tenant do SAP Cloud ALM e também para o cockpit do BTP.
  4. Link para acessar o cockpit do BTP - https://account.hana.ondemand.com/#/home/welcome
  5. Verifique o e-mail de notification@sap.com para o link de acesso ao seu SAP Cloud ALM e os próximos passos.
  6. Link para acessar Configuração e Administração para SAP Cloud ALM - Configuração da Fundação https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/enabling-api.

entry.title: [Webinar] SAP Cloud ALM - Streamlining Business Process While Preserving Clean Core - Español
entry.content:
[Webinar] SAP Cloud ALM - Streamlining Business Process While Preserving Clean Core - Español

Conozca las técnicas para optimizar procesos de negocio sin comprometer la integridad de su núcleo SAP. Este seminario web explorará métodos para identificar e implementar mejoras operativas que mantengan un "Núcleo Limpio", asegurando que su empresa se beneficie de los avances sin acumular personalizaciones que dificulten futuras actualizaciones e innovaciones.

Registrese aquí https://events.teams.microsoft.com/event/295ed136-904a-40c7-a124-eadb01db2a9f@42f7676c-f455-423c-82f6-dc2d99791af7

Requisitos previos     

Le solicitamos que complete los siguientes pasos antes de asistir al evento:

  1. Realice el proceso de activación de su tenant. Acceda al enlace para activar su SAP Cloud ALM (en caso de que aún no haya sido provisionado): https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/provisioning.
  2. Cómo Solicitar SAP Cloud ALM en SAP for Me - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=axFjM01ZnU0
  3. Recuerde el ID de usuario y la contraseña que se usaron para activar el inquilino de SAP Cloud ALM y también para el cockpit de BTP.
  4. Enlace para acceder al cockpit de BTP - https://account.hana.ondemand.com/#/home/welcome
  5. Verifique el correo electrónico de notification@sap.com para el enlace de acceso a su SAP Cloud ALM y los próximos pasos.
  6. Enlace para acceder a la Configuración y Administración de SAP Cloud ALM - Configuración de la Fundación https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/enabling-api.

entry.title: [Webinar] - Português - Ensuring a Clean Core with SAP Cloud ALM Test, Change and Deployment
entry.content:
[Webinar] - SAP Cloud ALM - Ensuring a Clean Core with SAP Cloud ALM Test, Change and Deployment - Português

Descubra como o SAP Cloud ALM pode ser uma ferramenta poderosa para garantir um núcleo limpo por meio de testes, mudanças e implementações bem gerenciadas. Este webinar oferecerá insights sobre como utilizar o SAP Cloud ALM para facilitar a gestão de ciclo de vida de aplicações, assegurando que as modificações realizadas mantenham o sistema ágil e preparado para o futuro.

Registre-se aqui https://events.teams.microsoft.com/event/424aec26-ba99-4022-94b2-472ca3c39141@42f7676c-f455-423c-82f6-dc2d99791af7

Pré-requisitos    

Solicitamos que você complete as seguintes etapas antes de participar do evento:

  1. Realize o processo de ativação do seu tenant. Acesse o link para ativar seu SAP Cloud ALM (caso ainda não tenha sido provisionado): https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/provisioning.
  2. Como Solicitar SAP Cloud ALM no SAP for Me - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=axFjM01ZnU0
  3. Lembre-se do ID de usuário e da senha que foram usados para reivindicar o tenant do SAP Cloud ALM e também para o cockpit do BTP.
  4. Link para acessar o cockpit do BTP - https://account.hana.ondemand.com/#/home/welcome
  5. Verifique o e-mail de notification@sap.com para o link de acesso ao seu SAP Cloud ALM e os próximos passos.
  6. Link para acessar Configuração e Administração para SAP Cloud ALM - Configuração da Fundação https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/enabling-api.

entry.title: [Webinar] Español - Ensuring a Clean Core with SAP Cloud ALM Test, Change and Deployment
entry.content:
[Webinar] SAP Cloud ALM - Ensuring a Clean Core with SAP Cloud ALM Test, Change and Deployment - Español

Descubra cómo SAP Cloud ALM puede ser una herramienta poderosa para asegurar un núcleo limpio a través de pruebas, cambios e implementaciones bien gestionadas. Este seminario web ofrecerá información sobre cómo utilizar SAP Cloud ALM para facilitar la gestión del ciclo de vida de las aplicaciones, asegurando que las modificaciones realizadas mantengan el sistema ágil y preparado para el futuro.

Registrese aquí https://events.teams.microsoft.com/event/1c32647f-3243-478d-a4a8-02262ff65504@42f7676c-f455-423c-82f6-dc2d99791af7

Requisitos previos     

Le solicitamos que complete los siguientes pasos antes de asistir al evento:

  1. Realice el proceso de activación de su tenant. Acceda al enlace para activar su SAP Cloud ALM (en caso de que aún no haya sido provisionado): https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/provisioning.
  2. Cómo Solicitar SAP Cloud ALM en SAP for Me - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=axFjM01ZnU0

  4. Enlace para acceder al cockpit de BTP - https://account.hana.ondemand.com/#/home/welcome
  5. Verifique el correo electrónico de notification@sap.com para el enlace de acceso a su SAP Cloud ALM y los próximos pasos.

entry.title: [Webinar] - SAP Cloud ALM - Operational Excellence Driving Clean Core - Português
entry.content:
[Webinar] - SAP Cloud ALM - Operational Excellence Driving Clean Core - Português

Explore como a excelência operacional pode ser o motor para manter um "Clean Core" em sua organização. Este webinar discutirá as melhores práticas e estratégias para alinhar operações com objetivos de negócio, minimizando a customização desnecessária e promovendo um ambiente de TI sustentável e escalável. Aprenda como a excelência operacional contribui para um sistema SAP mais eficiente e flexível.

Registre-se aqui https://events.teams.microsoft.com/event/faaa208d-4f7f-4a83-9050-947db1493146@42f7676c-f455-423c-82f6-dc2d99791af7

Pré-requisitos    

Solicitamos que você complete as seguintes etapas antes de participar do evento:

  1. Realize o processo de ativação do seu tenant. Acesse o link para ativar seu SAP Cloud ALM (caso ainda não tenha sido provisionado): https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/provisioning.
  2. Como Solicitar SAP Cloud ALM no SAP for Me - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=axFjM01ZnU0
  3. Lembre-se do ID de usuário e da senha que foram usados para reivindicar o tenant do SAP Cloud ALM e também para o cockpit do BTP.
  4. Link para acessar o cockpit do BTP - https://account.hana.ondemand.com/#/home/welcome
  5. Verifique o e-mail de notification@sap.com para o link de acesso ao seu SAP Cloud ALM e os próximos passos.
  6. Link para acessar Configuração e Administração para SAP Cloud ALM - Configuração da Fundação https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/enabling-api.

entry.title: [Webinar] SAP Cloud ALM - Operational Excellence Driving Clean Core - Español
entry.content:

Explore cómo la excelencia operativa puede ser el motor para mantener un "Núcleo Limpio" en su organización. Este seminario web discutirá las mejores prácticas y estrategias para alinear las operaciones con los objetivos del negocio, minimizando la personalización innecesaria y promoviendo un entorno de TI sostenible y escalable. Aprenda cómo la excelencia operativa contribuye a un sistema SAP más eficiente y flexible.

entry.title: [Webinar] The Future of Data Transformation with SAP Cloud ALM Business Transformation Center
entry.content:
[Webinar] The Future of Data Transformation with SAP Cloud ALM Business Transformation Center

Join us to explore the future of seamless data transformation. In this session, we will introduce the SAP Business Transformation Center and demonstrate the innovative Selective Data Transition approach. Learn how this powerful tool can streamline your data migration and transformation processes.

Key Benefits Include:

Guided Data Migration and Transformation:
- Enjoy a streamlined and guided data migration and transformation experience
- Utilize one comprehensive solution that combines methodology, process, and content
- Benefit from SAP support, available for RISE with SAP

Accelerate Time-to-Market:
- Speed up migration and transformation projects
- Reduce planning and execution complexity
- Enhance quality through integrated testing
- Facilitate traceability and governance

Improve Competitiveness:
- Lower implementation costs through time efficiency and scalability with qualified consultants
- Ensure higher reliability with solution provisioning by SAP
- Take advantage of this offering already included in SAP support

Don't miss this opportunity to discover how SAP Cloud ALM Business Transformation Center can revolutionize your data transformation journey.

Register now! https://events.teams.microsoft.com/event/e05bf53a-d559-4dad-a0d5-c2df8cc50ce2@42f7676c-f455-423c-82f6-dc2d99791af7

entry.title: Re: SAP Academic Community Conference LAC 2025
entry.content: Hello everyone! I participated last year! I'm going to the 2025 edition!

entry.title: Re: EC Time - Tipps and hints Nr. 5: how to accrual vacation time accounts based on EC time sheet da
entry.content:
Hi @ltorres 

requirements can be met with a simple Time-in-lieu solution.
In EC timesheet set up valuation rule to check if it a working day or non-working day. If it a non-working entries are stored in a specific Time Type group, set a fraction of 0.5. Output time category will be overtime. 
Set a TOIl account with a time type TOIL absence. 

refer to implementation guide for detail configuration steps.

entry.title: Queries on DB compatibility and impact on domain change
entry.content:
Our current Business Objects version is 4.2 SP2 Patch 8, currently working on installation of 4.3 SP4 Patch11 in new DIGITS windows operation system PERSON_NAME.
1. Our database team informed that, they are planning to migrate the SQL server (where our CMS database is hosted) to DIGITS Windows Operating system servers, kindly let us know if it is compatible
2. We are currently using US domain, if we are changing to different domain will there be any impact?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Novas notas SAP paa a Reforma Tributária
entry.content:
Olá a todos!

Recentemente, a SAP liberou as notas SAP que atenderá ao esquema de cálculo TAXBRJ e atualizações na TAXBRA. 

Seguem as notas SAP atualizadas até agora: 

3561376 - Nota principal

Notas de Solução

3552903 - Grupos de impostos e tipos de imposto adicionados 'a nota fiscal.

3552901 - Objetos de pré - requisito para a nota SAP 3552903

3563053 - Orientação sobre Support Package mínimo para Mudanças Legais no Brasil

3556404 - Inclusão dos impostos CBS e BS na RVABRA

3569061 - Inclusão dos impostos CBS e IBS na TAXBRA

3582512 - Inclusão dos impostos CBS e IBS na TAXBRJ

SAP Tax Declaration Framework for Brazil SAP Tax Classification and Reporting Localization Oil, Gas, and Energy

entry.title: How to define Currency Key in transation MC46 report?
entry.content:
When I run the report checking the "All plants cumulated" option, the Currency Key appears as USD. If I uncheck it and add a Plant, it appears as BRL.

 

I unchecked the "All plants cumulated" option and filled the Plant option.

I wish it was always BRL

entry.title: SAP B1 Add-On Administration giving error on creating AddOn Error: Unable to locate application file
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I am trying to create AddOn in VB.Net using VS2019. My project type is vb.net Project. I have created installer also. My SAP B1 is Version 10 64bit. I have created both VB.Net application using Target CPI x64. I have placed both installer.mis and setup.exe in same folder and have created .ard file. But no matter what I do, I always get error when I am installing AddOn in SAP B1 as Error: Unable to locate application file 'Installer.msi'.

Does anyone know what I am doing wrong?

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAC and S/4 HANA Public cloud

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Material Loan Regularization...
entry.content:
Hello @Magdalene_Iremu 

Have not tested the scenario in the system but as a solution you can create the material with material type - UNSB (Non valuated material) and receive that material in the system by using movement type 521 in transaction migo. Whenever you return the same material you can use the sale order with item category TANN, so that, that same material out from your gate without any cost as you are receiving the goods as a loan and at the time of receiving and you are not paying anything to vendor or third party.

Let me know if any clarification.

Regards,

Neeraj Jain

Metadata Extension

But not in the Object Page when creating, Editing or just displaying

 

Is there something I'm missing?

entry.title: Re: Question and Answers requests in private messages
entry.content:

On regular basis I am also receiving the queries from LinkedIn members and I always recommend that go to SAP Community and raise the question and unfortunately some people ask how I can raise the question on SAP Community or registered on SAP Community. Then I elaborate the process how to register and post the question on SAP Community alongwith link of creation of to create Universal ID.

Have save link of this post for future reference.

entry.title: Re: Generic Delta Extraction using Function Module not wo...
entry.content: Hi Alex, If your custom datasource doesn't have a key field (in table ROOSFIELD, no field has 'KEYFLAG DS = X'), then this datasource is only possible for load type initial only just as mentioned in the popup. If you want to enable delta for this datasource, you may append a field called PRIMARYKEY with rollname = PRIMARYKEY. Em... you may refer to the details in Note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003587890. In case you want to use a CDS view, please also check Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3527268 Regards, Maggie

entry.title: Re: XSTRING to PrintPreview
entry.content: can you please if this issue is solved , how you did it ?

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Material Loan Regularization...
entry.content:
Hi @Magdalene_Iremu ,

Please validate and let us know if futher questions.

I think you can use cost center/ GL...etc for loan receive and loan return with mvt type similarly 201 or 202.

Example 202 with cost center- Receive 

201 with cost center - Return 

Its been long time, we used one of the project.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Save Purchase Requisition as DRAFT from ME51N.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I got this requirement to add option to save PR as DRAFT  from ME51N.

I could see the tile 'Purchase Requisition - Professional' has the option to save as draft button.

Requirement:

The user should be able to save the PR as draft and then retrieve it and make changes in it.
Also, is there an option to see the attachment in the ME51N screen while the PR creation itself?

We have already made a Z version of the Tcode so we can't just use the professional tile, we need the feature to be add in the ME51N itself. Also, I tried using the hold feature - but it's more like a document in hold, right?

How can I get this requirement done? Any comments would be of great help.

Soma

Or is it only the CDC to CDP connector that does not currently support mapping arrays, even if such structures exist in CDC? Appreciate your insights. Best regards, Moksh

entry.title: 🚀 Unlock the Power of Cloud, AI, and Business Transformation at SAP Sapphire 2025 in Madrid
entry.content:
From May 26 to 28, SAP Sapphire in Madrid will bring together the brightest minds, boldest innovations, and most impactful customer stories across the SAP ecosystem. Whether you're embarking on your RISE with SAP journey, transforming your support strategy with AI, or streamlining operations with SAP Cloud ALM, this is your chance to connect, learn, and get inspired.

If you're planning your agenda, make sure to explore the powerful lineup of sessions hosted by our SAP Customer Support & Cloud Lifecycle Management team. These sessions dive deep into real customer use cases, cutting-edge tools, and strategic insights that can help you unlock value, improve resilience, and stay ahead in today’s rapidly evolving business landscape.

✨ Don't miss these highlights from our team at SAP Sapphire Madrid 2025

📍 Main Theater & Breakout Sessions – Tuesday, May 27

SER1211 | 01:00 PM | Room 10.17
Achieving a clean core with your RISE with SAP journey
Wieland Schreiner
Learn how RISE with SAP enables a clean core in your transition to cloud ERP. See how SAP Cloud ALM supports transformation across five key dimensions and discover proven strategies for sustainable business success.

SER1213 | 01:30 PM | Room 10.17
Accelerating success: Unlocking value with smooth customer onboarding
Tom McKie
Discover how structured onboarding can fast-track value realization. This session shares strategies to drive adoption, increase customer lifetime value, and build a solid foundation for ongoing success.

SER1212 | 02:00 PM | Room 10.19
Streamline your RISE with SAP journey with the power of SAP Cloud ALM
Wieland Schreiner
Explore how SAP Cloud ALM works with SAP LeanIX and SAP Signavio to simplify landscape discovery, optimize processes, and enhance visibility. Hear success stories and practical takeaways for smarter transformation.

SER1372 | 02:30 PM | Room 10.15
Fast, Smart, and Scalable – How Bosch Leverages SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
Stefan Steinle, Bastian Kloiber (Bosch)
Get an inside look at Bosch’s two-tier ERP strategy using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. Learn how automation, SAP Best Practices, and close collaboration with SAP helped ensure smooth rollouts and operational success.

SER1215 | 03:00 PM | Room 10.18
Elevating your GROW with SAP journey with SAP Cloud ALM
Tonja Kehrer
Discover how SAP Cloud ALM can accelerate your GROW with SAP journey with real-time insights, demo-driven learning, and innovation strategies for scalable growth.

SER1214 | 03:30 PM | Room 10.18
Thriving in holiday peaks: How AI transforms system resilience
Stefan Steinle, Suhaim Mohamed (Douglas)
Explore how AI-driven holiday readiness safeguarded €11 billion in GMV for 143 customers. Learn how this initiative transforms system resilience and prepares your business for peak performance.

📍 Ask the Expert Sessions – Tuesday, May 27 | Room 10.201

SER1218 | 01:30 PM
Maximizing business value with AI-driven support tools
Wilhelm Juette
Explore how SAP Cloud ALM, Built-In Support, and the ITSM connector help you tailor support and drive value through intelligent automation.

SER1219 | 02:00 PM
AI – From A to Impact: A case study to measure business value with AI
Wilhelm Juette
See how SAP uses process mining and data insights to create a value measurement framework in the world of agentic AI.

SER1220 | 02:30 PM
Streamlining migration to SAP S/4HANA with lean selective data transition
Thorsten Spihlmann
Get hands-on strategies using the SAP Business Transformation Center to simplify and automate your SAP S/4HANA migration while focusing on what matters most.

SER1221 | 03:00 PM
Safeguarding operations during the smooth transition to SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Mirja Kempin, Markus Winter
Learn how to keep business continuity front and center during your move to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

SER1222 | 03:30 PM
Using AI and data-driven insights for a smooth customer support experience
Carsten Schwarz
Explore how AI and tools like SAP for Me are streamlining support by surfacing relevant case history, resolution paths, and customer insights.

🎯 Why You Should Attend

From onboarding to migration, support to system resilience—these sessions are packed with real-world insight, customer voices, and practical frameworks to drive your transformation forward. They also highlight SAP’s ongoing commitment to intelligent, cloud-based innovation that delivers measurable outcomes.

🗓️ Join us in Madrid!

We can’t wait to meet you onsite—stop by our sessions, ask your toughest questions, and connect with our experts to explore how AI, automation, and cloud transformation can take your business to the next level.

Let’s build the future together at SAP Sapphire Madrid 2025.

#SAPSapphire #SAPCommunity #CustomerSupport #SAPCloudALM #AI #RISEwithSAP #GROWWITHSAP

entry.title: Re: Get Your Enterprise Architect Skills Certified to Boost Your Career
entry.content:
I am writing to seek your assistance regarding the SAP Certified Professional - SAP Enterprise Architect exam (exam code: P_SAPEA_2023). Unfortunately, I have discovered that this exam expired in 2023. As I am keen on obtaining this certification, I would like to inquire about the availability of a new version of this exam.

I have already reached out to the SAP team but have not yet received any information regarding the new version of the SAP Certified Professional - SAP Enterprise Architect exam. I am eager to take the updated exam and would greatly appreciate any guidance or information you can provide on this matter.

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to your response.

entry.title: New features in SAP Warehouse Operator Version 2.5
entry.content:
New features in SAP Warehouse Operator Version 2.5

We have just released SAP Warehouse Operator Version 2.5 to the Apple App Store. Let’s have a look together at the new key capabilities:

  • Ad Hoc product warehouse task creation
  • Picking without Pick Handling Units

 

Ad Hoc Product Warehouse Task Creation

Ad hoc movements are unplanned goods movements that you create manually within a warehouse. The decision to make an ad hoc movement is not controlled by the system but by the warehouse operator. There can be several reasons for it, like wrong products located in a storage bin, damaged products or unplanned rearrangements of goods. It’s a great use case to be supported on mobile devices. We have now added ad hoc product warehouse task creation to the existing functionality to create warehouse tasks for the movement of Handling Units.

 

 

 

Picking without Pick Handling Units

You may now also use the app to pick items without a Pick Handling Unit. Simply create warehouse tasks for picking in the backend without assigning a Pick Handling Unit. These warehouse tasks will then also show up in the SAP Warehouse Operator app on your iPhone and can be started as well.

 

Try the app and engage with us

Please download the new version of the app and try it out yourself.

Please leave a comment below if you have questions or feedback and we’ll get back to you.

You may also contact us at SAP_Warehouse_Operator@sap.com if you have questions on the configuration to use the app, the setup process or have specific requirements.

We also encourage you to visit our SAP Mobile Applications community page and click “follow”. We’ll be publishing more informative blog posts. Please post questions in the SAP Extended Warehouse Management area. Want to be notified? Check your profile settings to ensure you have your settings activated

entry.title: Re: Reset ANLC to rebuild a depreciation area - S/4 HANA...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Resetting ANLC (Asset Value Totals Table) in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud for a depreciation area — usually to rebuild it cleanly — is a sensitive process, but it’s possible under the right conditions.

Here’s a full guide to do it safely and correctly, assuming no actual postings have been made yet in the depreciation area you want to rebuild.

 

When Can You Reset ANLC?

You can reset and rebuild depreciation area X (e.g., area 51) only if:

  • No FI documents (like depreciation or acquisition) have been posted in that area.
  • The area was recently added (e.g., via customizing).
  • You need to remove existing calculated values from AFAR or wrong derivations, and start fresh.

 

Step-by-Step: Reset & Rebuild ANLC for a Depreciation Area

1. Backup First !

Before any action, back up the asset tables:

  • ANLC
  • ANEP
  • ANEA
  • ANLB
  • ANLP

You can use transaction SE16N or export to Excel / use ABAP reports.

2. Mark the Depreciation Area as "Do Not Post"

In SPRO:

  • Financial Accounting > Asset Accounting > Valuation > Depreciation Areas > Define Depreciation Areas
  • Select your area (e.g., 51)
  • Mark it as:
    • No postings
    • Optional: Derived area (from 01)

Save.

3. Remove Values per Asset (if small number of assets)

In transaction AS02 (Change Asset Master):

  • Go to the Depreciation Areas tab
  • Select your target area (e.g., 51)
  • Clear all value fields (Acquisition, Depreciation)
  • If possible, mark the area as deactivated (checkbox)

Save and repeat per asset.

4. Use Program RAABSF00 (Rebuild Totals / Clear Area)

This is the standard SAP report to rebuild or clear depreciation area values:

Transaction Code: SA38
Program Name: RAABSF00

Run with parameters:

  • Company Code
  • Depreciation Area (e.g., 51)
  • Reset Mode: choose:
    • "Delete values for area" → removes values from ANLC for this area
    • "Rebuild from area" → copies from another area (like 01)

This program will:

  • Delete values from ANLC
  • Optionally rebuild them using rules (e.g., from area 01)

5. Rebuild Values (Optional)

If you need to recalculate values in the area:

  • Use transaction AFAR – Recalculate Values
  • This will repopulate ANLC/ANEP based on settings and derivation logic

Make sure config for area 51 is now correct.

6. Verify via AW01N

Open AW01N (Asset Explorer) for several assets and validate:

  • Area 51 is either empty or shows correct values
  • No net book value if area is not used

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

It presents an exceptional method to embark on your  expedition with added advantages, all the while extending to others to partake and reap their own rewards. How to use

entry.title: Re: How to have measures in between dimensions in SAC Table widget?
entry.content: Not sure what does this 'position a measure between two dimensions in the table widget' mean. Maybe it's better to provid an expected table layout.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Measure percentage difference
entry.content:
1. Create a restricted measure(PM) with time dimension -> navigation  -> previous period 

2. Create a calculated measure  = (CM - PM)/PM

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 - Chart View in Guided Selling when you have more than one Sales Cycle
entry.content:
When you open the Guided Selling feature in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2, the system displays a Kanban-like overview of the sales opportunities in the system, separated by Sales Phase.

 If there is more than one Sales Cycle configured in the system, the Kanban overview assume the first Sales Cycle in the system settings and displays the sales opportunities assigned to this Sales Cycle, separated by its respective Sales Phases:

 

You might select a different Sales Cycle, and the Kanban overview will then display the sales opportunities associated to this new Sales Cycle, also separated by its respective Sales Phases:

When you select the Chart View button, the system opens a series of charts from where you might also refine the selection of sales opportunities:

 

Note that the Sales Cycle in the Kanban view remains the same (01) after you open the Chat View.

For the Charts, however, all filters (including Sales Cycle) come blank by default (02), i.e. the charts will display information about all opportunities in the system, while the Kanban view will segregate the opportunities by the Sales Cycle selected in (01).

This Standard system behavior might eventually be somewhat deceiving, for the end user might initially get confused by the lack of synchronization between what is displayed in the Charts vs. the Kanban view.

For the Charts to be synchronized with the Kanban view, the end user must select a Sales Cycle in the Chart view.

entry.title: Re: Create_by_url : Issue in patch call from SAP ABAP
entry.content: First of all, if you compare manually, forget it, compare automatically using any comparison tool (Notepad++, etc.) Any different character may lead to an error. If it's still 500, you should contact the team who is responsible of the application in the server https://desk-******** to help you. Also, the response "500 internal server error" is accompanied by headers and body, so check this information too. NB: errors 5XX are "server errors" (i.e. sent by https://desk-********), I assume that SAP would never send 5XX errors in case of SAP issue, and it's why I insist that it's your message which is different from Postman, and I insist that you compare by software, not manually.

entry.title: Stay Ahead of Statutory Reporting in Poland: Join Our Exclusive Webinar for SAP Partners
entry.content:
Register now for April 24, 2025 / 4:00 PM CEST >>

Webinar: Standard Audit File-Tax (SAF-T) - Statutory Reporting in Poland (JPK) with SAP

 

In the ever-evolving landscape of business regulations, Poland has recently introduced new legal requirements that demand a higher level of compliance in statutory reporting. These updates, part of the country's drive towards a digital and transparent business environment, necessitate that companies adjust their systems to meet the new standards, particularly for Statutory Reporting in Poland (JPK). These changes aim to enhance transparency, combat tax evasion, and improve the overall efficiency of the tax administration process.

 

End of Life for SAP SAF-T Add-on for Polish Regulatory Requirements

If you are using the SAP SAF-T Add-on for Polish Regulatory Requirements, it's crucial to note that this application is reaching its end of life. By December 31, 2027, this add-on will no longer be maintained, with SAP S/4HANA on-premise customers losing use rights even earlier (read SAP Note 3096074 - S4TWL - Add-on for Polish SAF-T regulatory requirements and 2269324 - Compatibility Scope Matrix for SAP S/4HANA).

The limitations of this add-on as a niche product have become more apparent as regulatory demands grow, making it imperative for businesses to migrate to more advanced solutions that can handle the complexities of modern compliance requirements. Read more about ‘SAF-T Strategy: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance future direction and lifecycle end’ in SAP Note 3526880.

 

Transition to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

To ensure ongoing compliance and to benefit from the latest technological advancements, we recommend customers to transition to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance. This solution is specifically designed to address the complexity of statutory reporting worldwide, offering a robust and scalable platform that meets the evolving regulatory demands. By adopting SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, businesses can achieve seamless integration, ensure data accuracy, and maintain regulatory compliance with minimal disruption.

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance enables customer to create, process, and monitor electronic documents and invoices, as well as statutory reports. As a result, companies stay compliant with local legal obligations. This solution successfully covers requirements worldwide. SAP Document and Reporting Compliance won the Gold Stevie Award 2024 as well as Silver Stevie Awards 2023 and 2022.

 

Why Should You Attend Our Webinar?

 This webinar will provide you with:

  • Insights into the latest regulatory changes in Poland.
  • Detailed information on the end of life for the SAP SAF-T Add-on for Polish Regulatory Requirements.
  • A comprehensive overview of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Statutory Reporting in Poland (JPK).
  • Practical advice on how to assist your clients in transitioning to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

Don’t miss this opportunity to stay ahead of the curve and provide your clients with the best possible guidance. Register for our webinar today by clicking here. Join us to learn how SAP Document and Reporting Compliance can streamline your clients' compliance processes and ensure they are fully prepared for the future.

Find more information here:

  • SAF-T: Changes in accounting file JPK_KR (new JPK_PD aka JPK_CIT) as of 2025
  • SAF-T Poland: Release Strategy for "SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements (Private Cloud Edition/On-Premise)"
  • Compatibility Scope Matrix for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Using HANA Cloud’s "VECTOR_EMBEDDING" Function in CAP
entry.content:
@MioYasutake Thanks for this blog. We are trying to move the vectorDB to HANA Cloud and exploring the options with and without BTP Gen-AI hub.

I was trying to use the VECTOR_EMBEDDING function; when I use it from CAPM layer it returns the Vector Buffer not the embeddings directly. Hence, TO_REAL_VECTOR does not work in similarity search. I can use the VECTOR_EMBEDDING function directly in similarity search though. 

I am just wondering how did you make it work? If the getEmbedding function you are using returns buffer, how are you passing that directly to similarity search in TO_REAL_VECTOR? 

Regards, Anupam

entry.title: Gurugram Stammtisch: Invitation to SAP Community Members for Stammtisch at DLF Cyber Hub, Gurugram
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community Members,

We are delighted to invite you to the upcoming SAP Stammtisch, Gurugram. This gathering promises an engaging evening filled with networking, insightful conversations, and collaboration. 

Date: Wednesday, 16th April 2025
Time: Starting at 6:30 PM - 8:00 PM
Venue: DLF Cyber Hub, Gurugram - 122002

During the event, we will also plan and discuss the next SAP Inside Track Gurugram, an exciting community-driven initiative that brings together SAP professionals to share knowledge, experiences, and innovations.

Kindly confirm your participation by RSVP not later than Monday, 14th April 2025.

Join us for an enriching experience as we connect and share our enthusiasm for SAP!

Ravi Grover on behalf of SAP Gurgaon Community Core Team

Gurugram Stammtisch: Invitation to SAP Community M... - SAP Community

Ravi Grover on behalf of SAP Gurgaon Community Core Team

entry.title: Re: FINS_ACDOC_CUST201 When posting in the Create Outgoin...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In your starter system (S/4HANA Cloud, private or public), if you're getting an error when posting via FB70 (Create Outgoing Invoices), even though accounting principles are assigned to ledger 0L, it’s likely that some universal journal or ledger integration configuration is incomplete or inconsistent.

Let’s walk through what to check next, and then I’ll point you to useful SAP Notes and documentation.

 

1. Configuration Activities to Check

Here are the main activities you should verify:

a) Assign Accounting Principles to Ledger and Company Code

You've already done this, but double-check in:

SPRO → Financial Accounting (New) → Financial Accounting Global Settings (New) → Ledgers → Ledger → Assign Accounting Principle to Ledger and Company Code

  • Ledger 0L should be assigned to your company code with the correct accounting principle (e.g., IFRS, Local GAAP).
  • Ensure there is only one leading ledger assigned per company code.

b) Define Settings for Ledgers and Currency Types

Transaction: FINSC_LEDGER
Or via SPRO: Financial Accounting Global Settings → Ledgers → Universal Journal → Define Settings for Ledgers and Currency Types

For ledger 0L:

  • Check that it is active
  • Make sure currency types (10, 30, 40, etc.) are correctly defined
  • The Ledger Type should be Leading Ledger

c) Check Ledger Group Configuration

SPRO → Financial Accounting → Financial Accounting Global Settings → Ledgers → Ledger Group

  • Ensure the ledger group including 0L is correctly maintained
  • Some postings (e.g., in FB70) rely on the default ledger group to be consistent

d) Validate Company Code Settings

SPRO → Enterprise Structure → Definition → Financial Accounting → Edit, Copy, Delete, Check Company Code

  • Check that the company code currency and fiscal year variant are defined
  • Also check chart of accounts assignment

e) Run Customizing Consistency Check

Use transaction: FINS_CUST_CONS_CHECK

This program checks:

  • Ledger-to-company code relationships
  • Accounting principle mappings
  • Universal journal readiness

If anything is missing or inconsistent, it will show up here.

 

2. Useful SAP Notes for Ledger and FB70 Posting Issues

Here are some SAP Notes and KBAs that can help:

2209402 - Error when posting journal entry: Inconsistent customizing

2274321 - Customizing Consistency - Posting blocked despite only warning messages

2349209 - Run Ledger Customizing Check like during Posting

 

3. Special Consideration for Starter Systems

If you're in a SAP Starter System (S/4HANA Cloud test/demo environment), be aware:

  • Some customizing might be restricted or locked
  • If you’re missing a ledger setting, you may need to open a ticket with SAP to adjust it (especially in Public Cloud)

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy
